items.title: Parched western states at war over Colorado River amid fears major cities may have to accept huge water cuts
items.desc: Tens of millions of people rely on the Colorado River for water. The river has shrunk under extreme drought conditions, and leaders have not come to an agreement on how to share resources.

items.title: The US Tech Giant Where Employees Wear IDF Uniforms to Work
items.desc: The American tech giant behind the most popular tax filing software in the US allows employees to wear their IDF uniforms to work and also permits them to take months off the job to fight Israel’s wars.
